title: [Clara] SafetyFirst Fire & Safety — V1 agent generated (ACC-005)
body:
**Account ID:** ACC-005
**Company:** SafetyFirst Fire & Safety
**Version:** v1
**Business Hours:** ['Monday', 'Tuesday', 'Wednesday', 'Thursday', 'Friday'] 08:00–17:00 America/Chicago
**Services:** fire extinguisher sales, service, certification, exit and emergency lighting inspection

**Open Questions / Unknowns:**
- How to handle a caller listing 20 items they need serviced

**Next Steps:**
- [ ] Review generated agent spec
- [ ] Confirm transfer phone numbers
- [ ] Import spec into Retell dashboard
- [ ] Schedule test call

updates.message: Onboarding complete — v2 generated with 10 changes.
